---
title: "Team"
---

## Team Members

This project was completed by a team of five students in BNFO 420 Capstone:

- **Zoya Akhtar**
- **Saja Al Jariri**
- **Mariya Dehnuwala**
- **Courtney Sartor**
- **Khadeeja Bandukwala**

---

## Individual Contributions

Each team member contributed to different aspects of the analysis pipeline, presentation, and website development:

### Data Acquisition & Pipeline Development

| Team Member | Contribution |
|------------|--------------|
| **Mariya Dehnuwala** | Dataset selection and GEO download; Script 03 (PCA plots); Heatmap generation |
| **Khadeeja Bandukwala** | Script 01 (metadata organization); Script 04 (Limma differential expression) |
| **Zoya Akhtar** | Script 02 (normalization and filtering); Website development |
| **Courtney Sartor** | Script 05 (Volcano plots); Synthesis and interpretation slides |

### Presentation & Communication

| Team Member | Contribution |
|------------|--------------|
| **Saja Al Jariri** | Slide deck design and layout; GLP-1R background, hypothesis, and analysis pipeline slides |
| **Courtney Sartor** | Synthesis and interpretation slides |
| **Zoya Akhtar** | Website development and documentation |

---

## Analysis Pipeline Overview

Our team built a complete RNA-seq analysis pipeline from scratch:

1. **Data Acquisition** (Mariya) — Downloaded and organized 60 samples from GEO accession GSE293291
2. **Metadata Organization** (Khadeeja) — Created sample annotation table linking files to experimental conditions
3. **Normalization & Filtering** (Zoya) — Quality control and gene filtering (54,343 → 14,152 genes)
4. **Exploratory Analysis** (Mariya) — PCA plots to validate data quality and sample clustering
5. **Differential Expression** (Khadeeja) — Limma analysis across four experimental comparisons
6. **Visualization** (Courtney & Mariya) — Volcano plots and heatmaps of key findings
7. **Interpretation & Communication** (Courtney & Saja) — Scientific synthesis and presentation design
8. **Website Development** (Zoya) — Project documentation and results dissemination

---
